title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono, founding mathematician at Axiom Math, argues that competing with AI on knowledge acquisition is unwinnable for humans. He contends that true intelligence in the age of AI lies in curiosity, human judgment, and discovering overlooked talent, using Srinivasa Ramanujan as an example of genius missed by conventional systems.
